original_registry_entry.issuing_organisation: National Institute for Health and Care Excellence
original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: Joint replacement (primary): hip, knee and shoulder — Recommendations
original_registry_entry.population: Adults having primary elective hip, knee, or shoulder replacement.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Primary, secondary, and tertiary services before and after elective joint replacement.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for primary elective joint-replacement information and rehabilitation; partial for a generic orthopaedic postoperative workflow and not validated for UAE pathways.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.1.4 — shared decisions and information
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documentation of postoperative pain, wound care, recovery, rehabilitation, return to work or activity, concerns, questions, and procedure-specific information.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 1.10.1–1.10.6 — postoperative rehabilitation
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-documented mobility, activities of daily living, rehabilitation goals, self-directed or supervised rehabilitation, functional impairment, and physiotherapy or occupational-therapy follow-up.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendation 1.11.1 — long-term care and referral
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports orthopaedic review for new or worsening pain, limp, or loss of function related to a joint replacement while noting the absence of a general fixed monitoring schedule.

title: Joint replacement (primary): hip, knee and shoulder — Recommendations
publisher: National Institute for Health and Care Excellence
population: Adults having primary elective hip, knee, or shoulder replacement.
intended_setting: Primary, secondary, and tertiary services before and after elective joint replacement.
